mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT D.DEPT_CD as docWrtrDeptCd, D.DEPT_NM as deptNm FROM APRV_DOC A INNER JOIN DEPT D ON A.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD WHERE A.FORM_CD = 'RETIRE' ORDER BY D.DEPT_NM ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM APRV_DOC A INNER JOIN APRV_RETIRE R ON A.APRV_NO = R.APRV_NO
AND A.FORM_CD = 'RETIRE'
AND A.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD = #{params.dept}
AND (A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR R.EMP_NO LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%')
AND A.SUBMIT_DTM >= TO_DATE(#{params.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.SUBMIT_DTM <= TO_DATE(#{params.endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT a_inner.*, ROWNUM rnum FROM ( SELECT A.APRV_NO AS aprvNo, A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM AS docWrtrEmpNm, A.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD AS docWrtrDeptCd, D.DEPT_NM AS deptNm, A.STAT_CD AS statCd, A.SUBMIT_DTM AS submitDtm, R.EMP_NO AS empNo, R.EXP_RETR_DT AS expRetrDt, R.RETR_RSN AS retrRsn, R.PROC_STAT_CD AS procStatCd, A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM AS empNm FROM APRV_DOC A INNER JOIN APRV_RETIRE R ON A.APRV_NO = R.APRV_NO LEFT JOIN DEPT D ON A.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD = D.DEPT_CD
AND A.FORM_CD = 'RETIRE'
AND A.DOC_WRTR_DEPT_CD = #{params.dept}
AND (A.DOC_WRTR_EMP_NM LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%' OR R.EMP_NO LIKE '%' || #{params.keyword} || '%')
AND A.SUBMIT_DTM >= TO_DATE(#{params.startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND A.SUBMIT_DTM <= TO_DATE(#{params.endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY A.SUBMIT_DTM DESC ) a_inner WHERE ROWNUM <= #{paging.page} * #{paging.recordSize} ) WHERE rnum > (#{paging.page} - 1) * #{paging.recordSize}
